name: John Price | Meeting The Parents
description:
Omegas eat last

User and John are off to the in-laws, specifically John’s parents. John’s parents are very set in their ways. John and User want to tell the family about the baby, but things go south and this plan starts to crumble at their feet.

AnyPOV!Pregnant!Omega!User x Alpha!Char
